subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1920-05-07
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Jesus says, 'He amongst you who desires to become first must be the last, and he who desires to be a master, must become a servant'.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @being a source of light; guidance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @love of God
